report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides covering Shared Sequencing & Decentralized Sequencers (Espresso Network, based sequencing) and Wrapped Bitcoin Comparison (wBTC vs cbBTC vs tBTC vs LBTC vs sBTC), both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE with full SEO metadata and structured data.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Shared Sequencing: Espresso Network launched mainnet Feb 12, 2026 — first production shared sequencer for Ethereum rollups. HotShot consensus achieves ~6-second finality with 100+ nodes. $60M funding from a16z, Sequoia, Electric Capital. ESP token at ~$30.6M circulating market cap. Active integrations with Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism. Competitor Astria shut down Dec 2025 after raising $18M — validates difficulty of shared sequencer business model.

Wrapped Bitcoin Market: 300K+ BTC ($25B) wrapped across 10+ tokens. wBTC at 43% share (declining from monopoly), cbBTC at 25% (fastest growing, ~87K BTC / $6B cap), BTCB at 22%, LBTC at ~5% (peaked 20K BTC, now ~11K), tBTC at ~3% (growing among DeFi purists). wBTC controversy around Justin Sun/BiT Global joint venture led MakerDAO to tighten risk parameters and Coinbase to delist wBTC. cbBTC notably lacks proof-of-reserves unlike wBTC.

Both topics identified as genuine content gaps after exhaustive analysis of 269 existing learn pages. Selected based on March 2026 trending narratives (Espresso mainnet launch, Bitcoin DeFi/BTCfi growth) and practical user demand.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Shared Sequencing guide: ~3200 words, 12 min read, 10 sections + 6 FAQs. Covers what shared sequencing is, the centralized sequencer problem (censorship/MEV/SPOF/fragmentation), how shared sequencing works, Espresso Network deep dive (HotShot consensus, integrations, ESP token), based sequencing alternative, comparison table (shared vs based vs centralized), cross-rollup composability, risks (adoption chicken-and-egg, Astria failure, revenue cannibalization), 2026 outlook.

Wrapped Bitcoin Comparison guide: ~3400 words, 13 min read, 11 sections + 6 FAQs. Covers what wrapped Bitcoin is, market overview with share breakdown, individual deep dives on wBTC (Justin Sun controversy), cbBTC (missing proof-of-reserves), tBTC (threshold cryptography), LBTC (liquid staking), sBTC (Bitcoin-native), side-by-side comparison table across 11 dimensions, decision framework (which to use when), comprehensive risk analysis.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Shared Sequencing: Title 'Shared Sequencing & Decentralized Sequencers Guide 2026: Espresso, Based Rollups & More | degen0x', target keyword 'shared sequencing guide 2026', 10 keywords, Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG + Twitter Card, canonical URL, breadcrumbs, 5 internal links (MEV guide, modular blockchain, Pectra upgrade, cross-chain interoperability, based rollups)

Wrapped Bitcoin: Title 'Wrapped Bitcoin Comparison 2026: wBTC vs cbBTC vs tBTC vs LBTC | degen0x', target keyword 'wrapped bitcoin comparison 2026', 10 keywords, Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG + Twitter Card, canonical URL, breadcrumbs, 5 internal links (Bitcoin L2, BTC LSTs, Stacks sBTC, Babylon staking, RWA guide)
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts for next daily rollout

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript compilation: 0 new errors from new pages (142 pre-existing errors in 5 other files only)
Page structure validation: Shared Sequencing = 10 sections + 6 FAQs, Wrapped BTC = 11 sections + 6 FAQs
Both pages match established template pattern (Metadata, StructuredData, Breadcrumb, BackToTop, dark theme, TOC, comparison tables, callouts, FAQ schema)
